name: Green Bean Sesame Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons olive oil or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, cover the green beans with water and cook until they are crisp-tender.
2. Drain the beans in cold water and rinse them thoroughly.
3. Place the cooked beans in a serving bowl.
4. Sprinkle the remaining ingredients over the beans.
5. Toss gently to coat evenly.
6. Serve at room temperature.
